name: Anything Technologies Media, Inc.
summary: Anything Technologies Media, Inc. provides media duplication/replication and fulfillment services. The company offers duplication and replication services for DVDs, Blu-ray discs, and CDs; and USB duplication and printing services. It also provides supply chain solutions fulfillment and mailing services, custom silk-screen/offset media printing and packaging, and DVD and Blu-ray authoring/encoding services; and Website hosting, design, and SEO services. The company was formerly known as Exchange Mobile Telecommunications Corp. and changed its name to Anything Technologies Media, Inc. in September 2010. Anything Technologies Media, Inc. was founded in 1997 and is based in Ione, California.
